name: Grape Ice
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine water and sugar in a large saucepan. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the sugar dissolves.
2. Add lemon juice and frozen grape juice concentrate to the saucepan. Stir until the grape juice melts.
3. Pour the mixture into freezer trays. Freeze until firm, stirring several times during the freezing process.
Yield: 5-1/2 cups.
